title: Enhanced Side Shield!
description: Makes the shield appear on the side of your character to make it easier to see.
body:
# Enhanced Shield!
- Welcome to **Enhanced Shield!** This resource pack is specially made to **modify the position** of the **Shield** so it's easier to **see while PvP**, and making it look fancy.


<details>
<summary>Mod Supports!</summary>

+ Shield Expansion
+ More Vanilla Shields
+ Amethyst shield
+ Guarding
+ Enhanced Shield! - Expandable Edition

### Expansive Shield!
![Shield Expansion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9C9smEXn/images/de1e00a629d528da3ef62e2d94808483fb0a5d73.png)

</details>



### Left Hand Side (Off-hand)
![Left Hand Side (Off-hand)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c1c525747d6ae95eae6acd2334f95cf5a8d90ed.png)

<details>
<summary>Right Hand side</summary>

### Right Hand side
![Right Hand side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4614dd84dc6ad96d830c0d287f7119fa7494e0c5.png)

</details>

## Better Shield! - Expandable Edition

![BannerBetterShield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ec392f7b8b479dba73252210392de941c7cfed2.png)

Need a mod to go along with your Epic shield-full journey? Install the new and Improved Shield mod meant to be purely fun and go along with the resource pack!

Download Now [**Better Shield! - Expandable Edition**](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-shield!) as soon as it releases! **[Fabric Only]**

## Notes
This **resource pack** **does not remove** the ability to change the **Shape of your shield**, you can still apply **custom textures** to it and whatever there is. The _only_ thing that was configed was the **Position of the shield** (which is found in the .json files)
